title: bauhinia variegata var. candida
intro: Bauhinia variegata var. candida, also known as white orchid tree or white bauhinia, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae and is native to tropical Asia. The medicinal properties of Bauhinia variegata var. candida include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antiviral and antiparasitic properties. Bauhinia variegata var. candida can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
